final:
module top_module(
    input up,
    input en,
    input rst,
    output reg [3:0] cnt
);always @(posedge en or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            cnt <= 4'b0;
        end else if (en) begin
            if (up) begin
                cnt <= cnt + 1;
            end else begin
                cnt <= cnt - 1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule
